channel.title: Untagged on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Untagged on Arrans github.io

item.description: LLMs build upon Evol Insturct: WizardLM, WizardCoder, WizardMath

item.description: Android application for running Windows applications with Wine and Box86/Box64

item.title: apple/container
item.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.

item.title: martanne/dvtm
item.description: dvtm brings the concept of tiling window management, popularized by X11-window managers like dwm to the console. As a console window manager it tries to make it easy to work with multiple console based programs.
